name: ISO/IEC 25010:2023 — Product quality model (SQuaRE)
summary: The SQuaRE product-quality model: nine quality characteristics decomposed into sub-characteristics. The 2023 revision renames Usability to Interaction Capability and Portability to Flexibility, adds Safety as a ninth characteristic, and adds inclusivity, self-descriptiveness, resistance and scalability sub-characteristics. Serves as the backbone reference for most coverage domains.

leaves.name: Functional completeness
leaves.description: The set of functions covers all the specified tasks and intended user objectives.

leaves.name: Functional correctness
leaves.description: Functions provide correct results with the needed degree of precision.

leaves.name: Functional appropriateness
leaves.description: Functions facilitate the accomplishment of tasks with no superfluous steps or functions.

leaves.name: Time behaviour
leaves.description: Response, processing times and throughput rates meet requirements when performing functions.

leaves.name: Resource utilization
leaves.description: Amounts and types of resources used meet requirements when performing functions.

leaves.name: Capacity
leaves.description: Maximum limits of a parameter (e.g. concurrent users, data volume) meet requirements.

leaves.name: Co-existence
leaves.description: Performs required functions while sharing an environment and resources with other products without detrimental impact.

leaves.name: Interoperability
leaves.description: Can exchange information with other products and mutually use the exchanged information.

leaves.name: Appropriateness recognizability
leaves.description: Users can recognize whether the product is appropriate for their needs.

leaves.name: Learnability
leaves.description: Product can be learned to use with effectiveness, efficiency, freedom from risk and satisfaction.

leaves.name: Operability
leaves.description: Product has attributes that make it easy to operate and control.

leaves.name: User error protection
leaves.description: Protects users against making errors, e.g. guarding destructive actions.

leaves.name: User engagement
leaves.description: Presents functions and information in an inviting and motivating manner encouraging continued use.

leaves.name: Inclusivity
leaves.description: Can be used by people of various backgrounds (age, ability, culture) — new in 2023.

leaves.name: User assistance
leaves.description: Assists users, including those with the widest range of characteristics, to achieve their goals.

leaves.name: Self-descriptiveness
leaves.description: Presents appropriate information where needed so users don't need external sources — new in 2023.

leaves.name: Faultlessness
leaves.description: Performs functions without fault under normal operation (renamed from Maturity).

leaves.name: Availability
leaves.description: Operational and accessible when required for use.

leaves.name: Fault tolerance
leaves.description: Operates as intended despite the presence of hardware or software faults.

leaves.name: Recoverability
leaves.description: Can recover affected data and re-establish the desired state after an interruption or failure.

leaves.name: Confidentiality
leaves.description: Ensures data are accessible only to those authorized to have access.

leaves.name: Integrity
leaves.description: Prevents unauthorized access to, or modification of, programs or data.

leaves.name: Non-repudiation
leaves.description: Actions or events can be proven to have taken place and cannot be repudiated.

leaves.name: Accountability
leaves.description: Actions of an entity can be traced uniquely to that entity.

leaves.name: Authenticity
leaves.description: Identity of a subject or resource can be proven to be the one claimed.

leaves.name: Resistance
leaves.description: Continues operating correctly despite attacks by malicious actors — new in 2023.

leaves.name: Modularity
leaves.description: Composed of discrete components such that a change to one has minimal impact on others.

leaves.name: Reusability
leaves.description: An asset can be used in more than one system or to build other assets.

leaves.name: Analysability
leaves.description: Effectiveness with which impact of a change, defects, or parts to be modified can be assessed.

leaves.name: Modifiability
leaves.description: Can be effectively and efficiently modified without introducing defects or degrading quality.

leaves.name: Testability
leaves.description: Effectiveness with which test criteria can be established and tests performed.

leaves.name: Adaptability
leaves.description: Can be adapted for different or evolving hardware, software or other operational/usage environments.

leaves.name: Scalability
leaves.description: Can handle growing or shrinking workloads or adapt capacity to changing demand — new in 2023.

leaves.name: Installability
leaves.description: Can be successfully installed and/or uninstalled in a specified environment.

leaves.name: Replaceability
leaves.description: Can replace another specified product for the same purpose in the same environment.

leaves.name: Operational constraint
leaves.description: Operates within safe operational limits/constraints when exposed to hazardous states.

leaves.name: Risk identification
leaves.description: Can identify a course of events or operations that could expose life, property or environment to unacceptable risk.

leaves.name: Fail safe
leaves.description: Can automatically place itself in a safe operating mode, or revert to a safe condition, in the event of a failure.

leaves.name: Hazard warning
leaves.description: Provides warnings of unacceptable risks to operations or internal states to mitigate hazards.

leaves.name: Safe integration
leaves.description: Can maintain safety during and after integration with one or more components or systems.
